---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for MusicBot
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description
<!-- Clear and concise description of the feature -->

## 🎯 Use Case
<!-- Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve? -->

## 📝 Expected Behavior
<!-- How should this feature work? -->

## 💻 Implementation Details (Optional)
<!-- Suggested implementation approach (not required) -->

## 📦 Scope Impact
- [ ] Backend changes (command logic, data processing)
- [ ] Frontend changes (dashboard, web UI)
- [ ] Plugin or extension
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Deployment changes

## 🎚️ Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (important feature)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## 📊 Affected Components
<!-- Which parts of MusicBot would be affected? -->
- [ ] Queue Management
- [ ] Player Controls
- [ ] Music Source Integration
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Discord Integration
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🔄 Dependencies
<!-- Does this feature depend on other features or issues? -->

## 📸 Examples/References
<!-- Links to similar features, mockups, or references -->

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have checked existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with MusicBot's core purpose
- [ ] I have provided sufficient context and examples
- [ ] I understand implementation scope

## 📝 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other relevant information -->

---

**Note:** This issue template is protected under `.github/copilot-instructions.md` Rule 10. Do not modify without following the full workflow.
